UnitAbilities.Title: Digestion Spine
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model fights, after it has resolved its attacks, if one or more enemy models (excluding Vehicle models) were destroyed as the result of those attacks, this model regains up to D3 wounds.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chitinous Horrors
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Enhanced Toxic Miasma
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, the range of that unit's Foul Spores Aura ability is increased to 9".

UnitAbilities.Title: Prey Adaptation
UnitAbilities.Text:
Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to all melee weapons equipped by models in that unit until the end of the phase:
	▪ [SUSTAINED HITS 1] 
	▪ [LANCE] 
	▪ [LETHAL HITS]

UnitAbilities.Title: Overgrown Barbs
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Titanic units) that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this model is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Irresistible Force
UnitAbilities.Text: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Alpha Warrior
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Burrowing Claws
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 10", add the Vanguard Invader keyword, and it gains the Deep Strike ability. If it is an Infantry model, replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Raveners.

UnitAbilities.Title: Floating Horror
UnitAbilities.Text: Add the Fly keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Venomthropes, Zoanthropes.

UnitAbilities.Title: Leader-beast
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save, add the Psyker and Synapse keywords, and it gains the Shadow in the Warp ability. If it is an Infantry model, add the following unit to the list of units this model can be attached to: Neurogaunts.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vanguard-beast
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 8", add the Vanguard Invader keyword, and it gains the Fights First, Infiltrators, Lone Operative and Stealth abilities. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Hormagaunts, Von Ryan’s Leapers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Winged Biomorph
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", add the Fly and Vanguard Invader keywords, and it gains the Deep Strike ability. If it is an Infantry model, replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Gargoyles.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fear of the Unseen (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Feeder Tendrils
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a melee attack made by a model in this unit destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hyperstimulation
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Terror (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: If one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield when you unleash the Shadow in the Warp, subtract 1 from the Battle-shock test each enemy unit on the battlefield must take as a result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Synaptic Senses (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Monstrous Rampage
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Burrowing Claws
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 10", add the Vanguard Invader keyword, and it gains the Deep Strike ability. If it is an Infantry model, replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Raveners.

UnitAbilities.Title: Synaptic Senses (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unstoppable Monstrosity
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of each player’s Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Shell
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Save characteristic to 2+, and change its Deadly Demise D3 ability to Deadly Demise D6.

UnitAbilities.Title: Burrowing Claws
